title: AIS shows income Prefill JSON does not have — Prefill is stale

expected_output.note: FD interest present in AIS but absent in Prefill. Prefill was generated before this interest was reported to ITD. Use AIS value. No conflict — Prefill simply did not have it.

notes: Income in AIS but absent in Prefill is the most common case and is not a conflict — it simply means the Prefill was generated before the income was reported to ITD. The engine uses AIS. This is normal behaviour and should not alarm the taxpayer.
